name: Idp Education Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 62% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.5600, stop A$1.9750, target A$2.8500 (0.50:1) — then trail it.
